description: An employee is receiving a large bonus and wants to know how much they should have withheld for taxes to avoid a surprise bill.

nodes.task_description: Gather the employee's current year-to-date income and withholding information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all relevant paystub data.

nodes.task_description: Project the employee's total annual income, including the bonus.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately projects the total income for the year.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total projected tax liability and recommend an additional withholding amount for the bonus payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a specific dollar amount to have withheld from the bonus.
